title: ADR-0019: Studio BFF cell-compliance 421 signal
verdict_summary: ADR (decision record) for ENG-1428, recording the cellGuard 421 cell-compliance self-heal signal in orvex-studio-api. The decision is already landed (PR #18, commit a4e71f4) and its single build obligation — the inbound cellGuard middleware emitting the typed 421 CELL_MISMATCH/CELL_UNRESOLVED self-heal body via resolveCellCompliance — is covered by A-CELL-COMPLIANCE in covers-union plus the orvex-studio-api stories 'Cell-guard middleware + CELL_ID + same-cell service resolution' and 'Cell-contract compliance — healthz CELL_ID+CLUSTER_NAME, 421 guard'. It conforms to (does not define) the cell-discovery-contracts (ENG-1364) 421 shape and reads the ADR-0011 registry concept, both of which have their own homes. No un-covered build obligations. Zero gaps.

components.name: orvex-studio-api cellGuard inbound middleware
components.quote: The inbound `cellGuard` middleware in `orvex-studio-api` reads the verified `cell`/`cell_epoch` claim and applies a pure, synchronous decision function `resolveCellCompliance`

components.name: resolveCellCompliance (src/cell/compliance.ts)
components.quote: applies a pure, synchronous decision function `resolveCellCompliance` (`src/cell/compliance.ts`)

components.name: cell-discovery-contracts 421 self-heal body shape (ENG-1364)
components.quote: typed `421` body conforming to the `cell-discovery-contracts` self-heal shape ... { "error": "CELL_MISMATCH", "cell": "<deployment cell>", "cellEpoch": "<presented epoch>", "reDiscover": true }

components.name: ADR-0011 Tenant-to-cell registry
components.quote: The tenant-to-cell registry (ADR-0011) is the platform's sole global routing component; a tenant can move cells, bumping `cell_epoch`.
